logo_description: NovaDrive logo: a stylized uppercase 'N' formed by two vertical bars connected by a diagonal arrow that points upward-right, rendered in brushed silver or chrome metallic finish. The logo appears as a physical badge on the center of the front grille, on the steering wheel hub, and on the rear trunk lid of NovaDrive vehicles. On marketing materials the 'NovaDrive' wordmark appears in a narrow geometric sans-serif (similar to Futura Light) in silver or white on a matte black or dark charcoal background. The arrow element of the 'N' is the distinguishing feature — it angles at roughly 45 degrees, giving the letter a dynamic, forward-moving quality. Interior shots may show the logo embossed in leather on the center console or illuminated in the instrument cluster.
prohibited_contexts: reckless driving, speeding, or street racing
fossil fuel or oil industry imagery
competitor electric vehicle brands in the same frame
road rage or aggressive driving behavior
